title: Reuse Event
description: The application of a previously successful pattern, strategy, or solution structure in a later run.

id.description: Unique identifier for this reuse event.

source_run_id.description: Run identifier from which the pattern was sourced.

source_pattern_ref.description: Reference to the source pattern artifact.

target_run_id.description: Run identifier in which the pattern is being reused.

target_domain_id.description: Domain in which the pattern is being reused.

reuse_type.description: Category of reuse: STRATEGY, STRUCTURE, EVALUATOR_ORDER, PROMPT_PATTERN, or REPAIR_PATTERN.

validation_status.description: Status of reuse validation: PASS, FAIL, BLOCKED, or UNKNOWN.

mismatch_notes.description: Notes describing mismatches found during reuse validation.
